theme: Polish the edges, animate the gaps — small details that make the office breathe
visual_observations: Review #41 based on full source code analysis of Office.jsx (1163 lines), Office.css (1923 lines), App.jsx (1177 lines), App.css (1063 lines). Prior review items checked: desk monitor screens ✅, progress ring burst ✅, bloberto stress tells ✅, vibe weather widget ✅, wall clock ✅. Four items still unimplemented from prior reviews carried forward.

ideas.title: Mobile Office Scale Fix — The Floor Deserves the Full Viewport
ideas.description: CARRIED FORWARD (reviews 39, 40). On mobile 375px, the office floor is a tiny postage stamp with characters at 10-14px. Names and idle timers are unreadable. Fix in Office.css: @media (max-width: 480px) { .office-wrap { padding: 0.3rem; } .office-floor { border-radius: 8px; min-height: 70vh; } .char__name { font-size: 0.32rem; } .idle-duration { font-size: 0.26rem; } .wb-vibe-text { font-size: 0.55rem; } .desk__nameplate { font-size: 0.28rem; } } In App.css: @media (max-width: 480px) { .header { padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem; } .tab-toggle { margin: 0.3rem 0; } .header h1 { font-size: 1rem; } }. WHY: The office is the hero feature. On mobile it's unusable. This has been carried forward three reviews — it's a must-fix.

ideas.title: Idle Character Ambient Micro-Bubbles — Wanderers Have Inner Lives
ideas.description: CARRIED FORWARD (review 40). Idle workers wander silently. wanderTooltips exist but only on hover. Make them ambient. In Character component: const [idleBubble, setIdleBubble] = useState(false). useEffect when variant==='idle': setTimeout at 8000 + wanderIdx*3000ms, show bubble for 2200ms, then hide. Render div.idle-micro-bubble with activity emoji (coffee/whiteboard/window/zen based on wanderIdx). CSS: .idle-micro-bubble { position: absolute; top: -12px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); font-size: 0.5rem; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 8px; padding: 1px 5px; animation: micro-bubble 2.2s ease-out forwards; pointer-events: none; z-index: 10; } @keyframes micro-bubble { 0% { opacity:0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(4px) scale(0.8); } 18% { opacity:1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0) scale(1); } 75% { opacity:1; } 100% { opacity:0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-8px); } }. WHY: Wandering with occasional thought bubbles transforms movement into personality.

ideas.title: After-Hours Starfield Floor — The Office Becomes the Night Sky
ideas.description: CARRIED FORWARD (reviews 38, 39, 40). During after-hours the floor is deep indigo but static. Add in Office.css: .office-floor[data-vibe='after-hours']::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; background-image: radial-gradient(circle 1.5px at 7% 14%, rgba(255,255,255,0.55) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1px at 19% 38%, rgba(255,255,255,0.4) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1.5px at 34% 9%, rgba(200,200,255,0.5) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1px at 52% 22%, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1.5px at 68% 47%, rgba(200,200,255,0.5) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1px at 81% 11%, rgba(255,255,255,0.4) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1px at 12% 61%, rgba(255,255,255,0.35) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1.5px at 43% 72%, rgba(200,200,255,0.5) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1px at 74% 68%, rgba(255,255,255,0.4) 1px, transparent 1px), radial-gradient(circle 1px at 91% 33%, rgba(255,255,255,0.45) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 100% 100%; animation: starfield-twinkle 4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes starfield-twinkle { 0%,100% { opacity:0.6; } 50% { opacity:1; } }. WHY: After-hours is the loneliest vibe. Stars on the floor make it poetic. Zero DOM, pure CSS.

ideas.title: Ghost Desk Dust Aura — Abandoned Desks Collect Memories
ideas.description: CARRIED FORWARD (review 40). Ghost desks (.desk--ghost) look faded but not abandoned. Add in Office.css: .desk--ghost::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -4px; border-radius: 8px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 50% 110%, rgba(148,163,184,0.12), transparent 70%); animation: ghost-dust 5s ease-in-out infinite; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; } @keyframes ghost-dust { 0%,100% { opacity:0.4; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity:0.8; transform: scale(1.04); } } .desk--ghost::after { content: '···'; position: absolute; top: -10px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); font-size: 0.4rem; color: rgba(148,163,184,0.35); letter-spacing: 0.3em; animation: desk-dust-float 7s ease-in-out infinite; pointer-events: none; } @keyframes desk-dust-float { 40% { opacity:0.7; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(-6px); } 0%,80%,100% { opacity:0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0); } }. WHY: OOO should feel like absence, not just inactivity.

ideas.title: Desk Keystroke Sound Variation — Each Worker Types Differently
ideas.description: The .desk-keystrokes div currently shows 'tap', 'clack', 'click' for ALL workers identically. Make it per-worker. In Office.jsx, define KEYSTROKE_WORDS = { carlos: ['git', 'push', '→'], maya: ['px', 'flex', '✦'], dave: ['sudo', 'grep', '$'], sofia: ['assert', 'pass', '✓'], luna: ['✨', 'hmm', '💡'] }. In the desk rendering, replace the hardcoded spans with: {(KEYSTROKE_WORDS[occ.worker.id] || ['tap','clack','click']).map((word, j) => {word})}. WHY: Tiny personalization. Carlos pushes code, Maya tweaks pixels, Dave runs commands. It's a two-line change that adds character.

ideas.title: Team Sprint Victory Lap — When Everyone Ships, the Floor Goes Gold
ideas.description: CARRIED FORWARD (review 40). When all workers hit 100% progress simultaneously, nothing special happens on the floor. Add: const allComplete = workingWorkers.length > 0 && workingWorkers.every(w => w.progress >= 100). Track rising edge with useRef, set victoryLap state for 6000ms. Add data-victory to office-floor. CSS: .office-floor[data-victory]::before { content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; pointer-events:none; z-index:0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 100%, rgba(251,191,36,0.18), transparent 70%); animation: victory-gold 6s ease-in-out forwards; } @keyframes victory-gold { 0% { opacity:0; } 15% { opacity:1; } 75% { opacity:1; } 100% { opacity:0; } }. WHY: Individual completions are celebrated. Team completion should be the rarest, most earned event.

ideas.title: Coffee Corner Refill Animation — Steam Intensifies with More Idle Workers
ideas.description: The coffee corner has static steam (3 spans). Scale steam intensity based on idle worker count. In Office.jsx, pass idleCount={idleWorkers.length} to the coffee-corner div via a data attribute: data-crowd={idleWorkers.length >= 3 ? 'busy' : idleWorkers.length >= 1 ? 'some' : 'empty'}. In Office.css: .coffee-corner[data-crowd='busy'] .coffee-steam span { animation-duration: 0.8s; } .coffee-corner[data-crowd='empty'] .coffee-steam { opacity: 0.3; }. WHY: More idle people = more coffee consumption = busier coffee corner. It's environmental storytelling through steam.
